670 ENMA - Engineering, Materials

ENMA495 Polymeric Engineering Materials | (3 Credits)

Study of polymeric engineering materials and the relationship to structural type. Elasticity, viscoelasticity, anelasticity and plasticity of single and multiphase materials. Emphasis is on polymetric materials. Prerequisite: ENMA300.
